sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103280" key="te/taros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τέτᾰρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n103280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pheasant</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1645.tlg001:2J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.Euerg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2J.</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τατύρας</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
